## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test improvement

- Change 1
- Change 2

## Testing

**How was this tested?**

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] Tested on multiple platforms

cargo test output here

## Performance Impact

**Does this change impact performance?**

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Performance improvement (include benchmarks)
- [ ] Minor performance degradation (justified because...)
- [ ] Unknown (needs benchmarking)

## Breaking Changes

**Does this introduce breaking changes?**

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (describe migration path)

If yes, describe:
1. What breaks
2. How to migrate
3. Deprecation timeline

## Documentation

- [ ] Code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Public API documented with rustdoc
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] Migration guide added (for breaking changes)

## Security Considerations

- [ ] No security implications
- [ ] Reviewed for security issues
- [ ] Includes security improvements

**Describe any security implications**

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines (`cargo fmt`)
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Comments added in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No new warnings generated (`cargo clippy`)
- [ ] Tests added that prove the fix/feature works
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`cargo test`)
- [ ] Dependent changes have been merged and published
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits format

**Reviewer Checklist** (for maintainers)

- [ ] Tests adequate
- [ ] Documentation sufficient
- [ ] No security concerns
- [ ] Performance acceptable
- [ ] Breaking changes justified
- [ ] Ready to merge
